distribution.description: With our selected sales partners, we offer you a powerful network of products and services.
distribution.title: Distribution

downloads.description: Our company attaches great importance to quality, safety and reliability.
downloads.title: Downloads & Certificates

production.description: International set packers benefit from our non-sterile bulk deliveries to complete their surgical trays.
production.title: Standards and customer-oriented solutions

repair.description: Our range of services includes all surgical instruments such as scissors, clamps, needle holders and container systems.
repair.title: In-House Repair Services

textBlocks.content: Our specialized team of surgical mechanics carries out professional repairs to surgical instruments of various specialties, container systems and compressed air hoses for orthopaedics to the highest standards in order to maintain their functionality and service life.
textBlocks.title: Professional repair service

textBlocks.content: Wide range of high-quality sterile and non-sterile tubing systems for various medical applications. Non-sterile tubing systems are supplied exclusively to set packers to complete their existing customer sets.
textBlocks.title: Sterile & non-sterile tubing systems

textBlocks.content: We offer you an extensive range of medical products from leading manufacturers for use in clinics, surgeries and medical facilities. Get an overview of our services from our selected partners or contact us directly.
textBlocks.title: Distribution of medical devices

textBlocks.content: Certified manufacturer of sterile and non-sterile tubing sets that meet the highest quality standards. Our in-house repair service is also certified in accordance with DIN EN ISO 13485.
textBlocks.title: Certified hose sets

textBlocks.content: We offer comprehensive services for medical facilities, including the repair, maintenance and procurement of medical devices and accessories. In the area of sterile supply logistics and storage, we offer you comprehensive solution concepts as the basis for a smooth sterile supply cycle.
textBlocks.title: Comprehensive services

textBlocks.content: Dücker Medizintechnik has stood for quality and innovation since 1991. With over 30 years of experience and a modern ISO Class 8 cleanroom, we offer first-class disposable medical products and set new standards in medical technology.
textBlocks.title: Many years of experience and innovation

hero.badge: Production and distribution of sterile and non-sterile tubing sets, distribution of medical products, repair and service of surgical instruments and compressed air hoses.
hero.partners: We offer you a powerful network of products and services through our selected sales partners.
hero.text: Discover our wide range of products and services for repairing and maintaining the value of surgical instruments. Find out how we can help you to ensure optimum care in a medical context.
hero.title: Your partner for repair and service of surgical instruments, production and distribution of sterile tubing systems and medical devices

repair.text: Repair and maintenance of medical devices.
repair.title: Reparatur

stickyScroll.text: We offer you a comprehensive range of services for the reprocessing of surgical tools and supplies in a medical context. Find out more about our services and products.
stickyScroll.title: From production to repair: the entire value chain from a single source.

seo.description: Discover our wide range of products and services for the reprocessing of surgical tools. Find out how we can help you to ensure optimum care in a medical context.
seo.title: Dücker Medizintechnik, Repair & service of surgical instruments, production and distribution
